title: Blink Charging Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Blink Charging Q1 2024 Earnings Summary. Key Financial Metrics. Revenue Performance: Total Q1 revenue: $37.6 million (73% YoY growth), Product sales: $27.5 million (68% increase), Service revenue: $8.2 million (72% increase), Charging service revenue: $5 million (74% increase). Profitability: Gross profit: $13.4 million (36% margin, vs. 21% prior year), Gross profit increased 195% while maintaining operational efficiency, Adjusted EBITDA loss: $10.2 million (improved $7.6 million YoY), EPS: -$0.17 per share (improved from -$0.53). Operational Metrics: 4,555 chargers deployed globally in Q1, 30 gigawatts of energy dispensed across networks, Nearly 95,000 total chargers deployed since inception, Operating expenses decreased 13%. Balance Sheet: Cash and equivalents: $93.5 million, Zero cash debt obligations. 2024 Guidance: Revenue: $165-175 million, Gross margin: 33%, Positive adjusted EBITDA run rate by December 2024. Strategic Highlights: EV penetration reached 7.3% in Q1 2024, Non-Tesla EV manufacturers reported 50%+ sales growth, Selected as official EV charger provider for New York state.
